topics.title: Radio Show Musical Segments and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio explores various musical tracks, including a Jimi Hendrix song associated with a colleague, several rap recordings by different personalities, and a public service announcement featuring David Blaine.

topics.title: Media Personalities and Public Controversy
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including a guest's financial struggles, public backlash against Chuck Zito for his behavior toward police, concerns regarding concert billing for Artie Lange, and listener feedback on the show's content.

topics.title: Reflections on Local Schools and Media Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses a donation request from the host's former school district, his experiences with childhood bullying, and a recent interaction regarding celebrity rumors involving Perez Hilton.

topics.title: Miss Universe Commentary and Carson Kressley
topics.summary: The studio mocks the humor of Carson Kressley during his commentary on the Miss Universe pageant.

topics.title: Miss Universe Commentary and Prank Calls
topics.summary: The studio discusses the Miss Universe competition, various celebrity updates, and features a series of aggressive prank calls.

topics.title: Interview with a Man Claiming to be God
topics.summary: The studio features a caller who identifies himself as God and discusses his beliefs, his website for selling crystals, and the potential for a future radio show.

topics.title: Nicole Bass and a Police Encounter
topics.summary: The studio features Nicole Bass discussing her career challenges as a bodybuilder while a caller claims to be an officer who once responded to a call regarding her.

topics.title: Nicole Bass Job Search
topics.summary: The studio discusses Nicole's financial struggles and potential employment opportunities, including a parts delivery job offered by a contact.

topics.title: Nicole Bass and Bob Leavitt Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Nicole Bass regarding her career challenges and personal life, followed by an appearance by Bob Leavitt who discusses his performance history and educational background.

topics.title: Mark Harris Near-Death Experience
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Mark Harris regarding his survival of heart surgery and the role Howard Stern's name played in his recovery.

topics.title: Marc Harris and Martha Ray
topics.summary: The studio features a candid conversation between Marc Harris and his co-host regarding his past marriage to actress Martha Ray, their personal lives, and potential future media projects.

topics.title: Interview with Released Inmate Crazy Cabby
topics.summary: The studio hosts an interview with a man known as "Crazy Cabby" who recently served a year in prison and claims to have been drugged while in a federal housing unit.

topics.title: Prison Experience and Release
topics.summary: The studio features a guest who describes his experiences in federal prison, including his mental state during incarceration, interactions with other inmates, and the conditions at the Fort Devens facility.

topics.title: Cabbie's Release from Prison
topics.summary: The studio welcomes back a former regular, Cabbie, who discusses his experiences with drug use, mental health concerns, and the realities of life in federal prison.

topics.title: Cabbie's Release from Prison
topics.summary: The studio hosts and guests discuss Cabbie’s release from prison, his experiences with a fanatical cellmate, the risks of violating parole, and his future career prospects.

topics.title: Radio Industry Anecdotes and International News
topics.summary: The studio features discussions regarding the experiences of local radio personalities, personal stories about incarceration, and reports on international events including sports doping allegations and Middle Eastern conflicts.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Legal Updates
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including the status of celebrity marriages, reports on teen drug use involving mothballs, legal issues surrounding baseball player Barry Bonds, and updates on various celebrities' health and public appearances.

topics.title: Host Confrontation and Comedy Tour Promotion
topics.summary: The show features a heated verbal altercation between the host and a guest over perceived insults, followed by discussions regarding upcoming comedy tour dates and promotional segments.
